creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
OK, I can see. So it seems that 3.6.11 was withdrawed. I don't why. I've received notifcation from FreeBSD ports that there is new version of phplist. And yes: I was able to download. But there is no message why 3.6.11 is not available.

So I think this bug can be "suspended" or even closed?
